welcome.subtitle: We’ll connect VPN in a couple of minutes.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Install the app
step1.desc: Download the Happ app to your device

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Get a temporary subscription
step2.descWaitingKey: Preparing the link — it may take a moment
step2.descReady: Happ will open — the key will be added automatically

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Activate the temporary subscription
step3.desc: Open Happ and follow the instructions

device.title: What device do you have?
device.subtitle: Choose a platform — we’ll show where to download the app.

install.title: Install the app
install.subtitle: Tap the button below to open the app store. Install Happ and come back here.

activate.introHtml: To activate VPN, do 2 steps in the Happ app:

step1.title: Activate the subscription
step1.descHtml: Tap the chain icon in Happ.

step2.title: Pay for the subscription
step2.descHtml: After activation, an (i) icon will appear in Happ — tap it to pay for the full subscription.
